mission.title: podman-container-tools: [Bug]: vscode devcontainers "features" feature fails on Windows and MacOS
mission.description: [Bug]: vscode devcontainers "features" feature fails on Windows and MacOS. This issue affects 45+ users.

steps.title: Identify podman-container-tools troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your podman-container-tools installation:
```bash
podman --version
podman info --format json | jq .version
```
Look for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review podman-container-tools configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant podman-container-tools configuration:
### Issue Description

Dev containers features fails on the podman buildx command, it looks like the temp file doesn't get copied correctly by the builder.
